content.json:
# 🌐 Azure Arc K8s Dashboard

Real-time overview of **all** Arc-enabled Kubernetes clusters across the subscription.

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.kubernetes/connectedclusters'
| project
    ['Cluster Name'] = name,
    ['Resource Group'] = resourceGroup,
    ['Location'] = location,
    ['K8s Version'] = tostring(properties.kubernetesVersion),
    ['Distribution'] = tostring(properties.infrastructure),
    ['Provisioning State'] = tostring(properties.provisioningState),
    ['Connectivity'] = tostring(properties.connectivityStatus),
    ['Last Connectivity'] = todatetime(properties.lastConnectivityTime),
    ['Agent Version'] = tostring(properties.agentVersion),
    ['Total Nodes'] = toint(properties.totalNodeCount),
    ['Total Cores'] = toint(properties.totalCoreCount),
    ['Managed Identity'] = tostring(identity.type)
content.title: Cluster Properties

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.kubernetes/connectedclusters'
| project
    ['Cluster Name'] = name,
    ['Resource Group'] = resourceGroup,
    ['Location'] = location,
    ['Kubernetes Version'] = tostring(properties.kubernetesVersion),
    ['Infrastructure'] = tostring(properties.infrastructure),
    ['Provisioning State'] = tostring(properties.provisioningState),
    ['Connectivity Status'] = tostring(properties.connectivityStatus),
    ['Last Connectivity'] = tostring(properties.lastConnectivityTime),
    ['Agent Version'] = tostring(properties.agentVersion),
    ['Total Nodes'] = tostring(properties.totalNodeCount),
    ['Total Cores'] = tostring(properties.totalCoreCount),
    ['Managed Identity'] = tostring(identity.type),
    ['Cluster ID'] = id
| order by ['Cluster Name'] asc
content.title: Cluster Details

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.kubernetes/connectedclusters'
| summarize
    ['Total Clusters'] = count(),
    ['Total Nodes'] = sum(toint(properties.totalNodeCount)),
    ['Total Cores'] = sum(toint(properties.totalCoreCount))
content.title: Capacity Summary

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.kubernetes/connectedclusters'
| project
    ['Cluster'] = name,
    ['Resource Group'] = resourceGroup,
    ['Nodes'] = toint(properties.totalNodeCount),
    ['Cores'] = toint(properties.totalCoreCount),
    ['Connectivity'] = tostring(properties.connectivityStatus),
    ['K8s Version'] = tostring(properties.kubernetesVersion)
| order by ['Nodes'] desc
content.title: Nodes & Cores per Cluster

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.kubernetes/connectedclusters'
| project Cluster = name, Nodes = toint(properties.totalNodeCount), Cores = toint(properties.totalCoreCount)
| order by Cluster asc
content.title: Nodes & Cores Distribution

content.query:
kubernetesconfigurationresources
| where type == 'microsoft.kubernetesconfiguration/extensions'
| extend clusterName = tostring(split(id, '/')[8])
| extend p = todynamic(properties)
| project
    ['Cluster'] = clusterName,
    ['Extension Name'] = name,
    ['Type'] = tostring(p.ExtensionType),
    ['Version'] = tostring(p.Version),
    ['State'] = tostring(p.InstallState),
    ['Auto Upgrade'] = tostring(p.AutoUpgradeMinorVersion),
    ['Release Train'] = tostring(p.ReleaseTrain)
| order by ['Cluster'] asc, ['Extension Name'] asc
content.title: Arc Extensions

content.query:
kubernetesconfigurationresources
| where type == 'microsoft.kubernetesconfiguration/fluxconfigurations'
| extend clusterName = tostring(split(id, '/')[8])
| extend complianceState = tostring(properties.complianceState)
| extend sourceKind = tostring(properties.sourceKind)
| extend gitUrl = tostring(properties.gitRepository.url)
| extend gitBranch = tostring(properties.gitRepository.repositoryRef.branch)
| extend namespace = tostring(properties.namespace)
| extend provisioningState = tostring(properties.provisioningState)
| project
    ['Cluster'] = clusterName,
    ['Configuration'] = name,
    ['Source Kind'] = sourceKind,
    ['Repository URL'] = gitUrl,
    ['Branch'] = gitBranch,
    ['Namespace'] = namespace,
    ['Compliance'] = complianceState,
    ['Provisioning State'] = provisioningState
| order by ['Cluster'] asc, ['Configuration'] asc
content.title: Flux Configurations

content.query:
kubernetesconfigurationresources
| where type == 'microsoft.kubernetesconfiguration/fluxconfigurations'
| extend clusterName = tostring(split(id, '/')[8])
| extend fluxConfigId = id
| mv-expand kustomization = properties.kustomizations
| extend kustomizationName = tostring(bag_keys(kustomization)[0])
| extend kustomizationObj = kustomization[kustomizationName]
| extend kustName = tostring(kustomizationObj.name)
| extend kustPath = tostring(kustomizationObj.path)
| extend portalLink = strcat('https://portal.azure.com/#resource', fluxConfigId)
| project
    ['Cluster'] = clusterName,
    ['Flux Config'] = name,
    ['Kustomization'] = kustName,
    ['Path'] = kustPath,
    ['Portal Link'] = portalLink
| order by ['Cluster'] asc, ['Flux Config'] asc
content.title: Deployed Applications (Kustomizations)

content.query:
policyresources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.policyinsights/policystates'
| where tostring(properties.resourceType) =~ 'microsoft.kubernetes/connectedclusters'
| extend complianceState = tostring(properties.complianceState)
| extend clusterResourceId = tostring(properties.resourceId)
| extend clusterName = tostring(split(clusterResourceId, '/')[8])
| summarize
    Compliant = countif(complianceState == 'Compliant'),
    ['Non-Compliant'] = countif(complianceState == 'NonCompliant')
    by ['Cluster'] = clusterName
| extend Total = Compliant + ['Non-Compliant']
| order by ['Cluster'] asc
content.title: Policy Compliance Summary per Cluster

content.query:
policyresources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.policyinsights/policystates'
| where tostring(properties.resourceType) =~ 'microsoft.kubernetes/connectedclusters'
| extend complianceState = tostring(properties.complianceState)
| extend policyDefId = tostring(properties.policyDefinitionId)
| extend policyAssignmentName = tostring(properties.policyAssignmentName)
| extend policyAction = tostring(properties.policyDefinitionAction)
| extend clusterResourceId = tostring(properties.resourceId)
| extend clusterName = tostring(split(clusterResourceId, '/')[8])
| extend defGuid = tolower(tostring(properties.policyDefinitionName))
| join kind=leftouter (
    policyresources
    | where type =~ 'microsoft.authorization/policydefinitions'
    | project defGuid = tolower(name), defDisplayName = tostring(properties.displayName)
) on defGuid
| extend portalLink = strcat('https://portal.azure.com/#view/Microsoft_Azure_Policy/PolicyDetailBlade/definitionId/', url_encode_component(policyDefId))
| project
    ['Cluster'] = clusterName,
    ['Policy Assignment'] = policyAssignmentName,
    ['Policy Name'] = coalesce(defDisplayName, policyDefId),
    ['Policy Link'] = portalLink,
    ['Action'] = policyAction,
    ['Compliance'] = complianceState
| order by ['Cluster'] asc, ['Compliance'] asc, ['Policy Assignment'] asc
content.title: Policy Details

content.query:
resources
| where (type startswith 'microsoft.kubernetes/' or type startswith 'microsoft.kubernetesconfiguration/' or type startswith 'microsoft.extendedlocation/')
    and type != 'microsoft.kubernetesconfiguration/privatelinkscopes'
| summarize Count = count() by ['Resource Type'] = type
| order by Count desc
content.title: Arc Resources by Type

content.query:
resources
| where (type startswith 'microsoft.kubernetes/' or type startswith 'microsoft.kubernetesconfiguration/' or type startswith 'microsoft.extendedlocation/')
    and type != 'microsoft.kubernetesconfiguration/privatelinkscopes'
| project
    ['Name'] = name,
    ['Type'] = type,
    ['Resource Group'] = resourceGroup,
    ['Location'] = location,
    ['Provisioning State'] = tostring(properties.provisioningState)
| order by Type asc, Name asc
content.title: All Arc Resources
